nodes.name: test_tournament_dashboard.py
nodes.summary: Tests the tournament dashboard rendering module, verifying that the live state panel and model-picker UI render correctly for empty, populated, and interactive states.

nodes.name: _render_dashboard
nodes.summary: Test helper that renders the tournament dashboard into a StringIO buffer via a Rich console and returns the captured output string.

nodes.name: test_dashboard_renders_populated_state
nodes.summary: Verifies that after recording a game result and pushing an event the dashboard renders without error and that standings are non-empty.

nodes.name: test_picker_renders
nodes.summary: Verifies that the model-picker UI renders both a named spec item and a random-agent spec item without errors.

nodes.name: test_tournament_discovery.py
nodes.summary: Tests the participant/run discovery logic, covering active and archived run detection, graceful handling of unreadable checkpoints, empty directories, and rejection of stale-encoded runs.

nodes.name: _write_descriptor
nodes.summary: Test helper that writes a MODEL_CONFIG_JSON descriptor file into a temporary run directory, with a configurable choice_dim_offset to simulate stale encodings.

nodes.name: test_discover_finds_active_and_archived_runs
nodes.summary: Creates two valid run directories (one active, one archived) plus one without a descriptor and asserts that discover_runs returns exactly the valid two.

nodes.name: test_stale_encoding_not_discovered_and_fails_seating
nodes.summary: Asserts that a run with a mismatched choice dimension is excluded from discovery and that attempting to load it as a player raises an error.

nodes.name: test_tournament_elo.py
nodes.summary: Tests the ELO rating system used by the tournament, covering expected-score symmetry, zero-sum update invariants, and order-independence of batch replays.

nodes.name: _game
nodes.summary: Test factory that constructs a GameResult fixture given round/pair indices, orientation, player identifiers, and scores.

nodes.name: test_replay_is_order_independent
nodes.summary: Verifies that replaying a shuffled list of game results produces the same final ELO table as replaying them in original order.

nodes.name: test_tournament_results.py
nodes.summary: Tests the tournament results aggregation module, verifying matchup bucketing by seat, per-participant record and ELO ordering, and JSON round-trip serialization of TournamentReport.

nodes.name: _two_game_pair
nodes.summary: Test fixture builder that creates two mirrored GameResult objects representing a balanced pair of games between the same two players.

nodes.name: test_matchup_splits_bucket_by_who_went_first
nodes.summary: Checks that the aggregate function correctly partitions game results into separate buckets based on which participant occupied the A seat.

nodes.name: test_tournament_schedule.py
nodes.summary: Tests the tournament schedule builder, verifying total game counts, balanced seating across all pairs, shared deal seeds for mirrored orientations, and A-seat orientation tracking.

nodes.name: test_each_pair_balanced_across_seats
nodes.summary: Asserts that for every pair in the schedule each participant sits in each seat the same number of times.

nodes.name: test_mirrored_orientations_share_deal_seed
nodes.summary: Verifies that mirrored game tasks within the same pair and round share an identical deal seed to ensure fair comparison.

nodes.name: test_version.py
nodes.summary: Tests the artifact versioning system, covering parse_version, check_artifact_compatible compatibility enforcement, adapt_encoding_for_version validation, and ModelConfig JSON round-trips with and without explicit version fields.

nodes.name: test_model_config_explicit_version_round_trips
nodes.summary: Builds a ModelConfig with an explicit version string, serializes it to JSON, and asserts the deserialized descriptor is identical.

nodes.name: test_model_config_defaults_missing_version
nodes.summary: Verifies that a ModelConfig serialized without a version field is deserialized correctly by applying the default version from the compat shim.
